description: Train an SB3 agent on a Gymnasium environment with eval + checkpoint callbacks; saves the final/best model and TensorBoard logs under record_store.
rules: read-only with respect to remote/live services — only writes under record_store
wraps the vendored train_rl_agent.py:train_agent unchanged (make_vec_env + EvalCallback + CheckpointCallback + model.learn + model.save)
ALGORITHM must be one of PPO/A2C/SAC/TD3/DDPG/DQN (resolved against stable_baselines3)
log_dir and save_path are forced under record_store
needs stable-baselines3 >= 2.8 (Python 3.10+), gymnasium, and torch present to actually train; degrades gracefully otherwise
usage: Set ENV_ID (Gymnasium id), ALGORITHM, POLICY, N_ENVS, TOTAL_TIMESTEPS. Output: train.json (run summary + model/log paths).
limitation: Does not tune hyperparameters or run TensorBoard. Heavy science libs (stable_baselines3/gymnasium/torch) and Python 3.10+ are required for real training; without them the porter records that the libs are absent and writes an empty-but-present report.
